docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,384.50 FILED BY KWIKCASH INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, NURIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANNA ARCHER LEGAL EXCUETIVE OFFICER. DEFENDANT NURIA ZAMUDIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
(SC-150) REQUEST FOR RESET FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH INC.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-15-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-15-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, NURIA $2,384.50 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,504.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $70.00) SERVED APR-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, NURIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, NURIA
